Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}My parents always nag me to, like, study for exams and stuff. They're so annoying![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I just became a second-year... I'm supposed to be having fun![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}They just came into some money, so they're getting all strict about my future and junk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}School uniforms are so boring. I wish they'd allow us to wear our own clothes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}Yeah, like that'll happen...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}My parents are bugging me to choose a college.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}Who decides that stuff in their second year? I just started![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}They say the best way to make God laugh is to make a plan... I bet my parents have made him die laughing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I'm going shopping soon. It's been a while.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I need new clothes. The summer fashions are almost here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}You don't seem very interested...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}Everyone's talking about the ghost and that kind of stuff...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I hate those kinds of stories.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}Like how they say the ghost will get you if you stay at school for too long...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}...Um, I better get going! See ya![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}Hey, I saw this girl last time, in front of the station...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}She was wearing a frilly white dress! It was like a "white goth"![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}Isn't it getting hot to be wearing those kinds of clothes...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}She must be seriously devoted to her look.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}There's no way I could pull that off in this kind of weather...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I heard from a friend online about this freaky site that's really taking off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}She said it's about revenge or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}Well, there's that revenge website, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}It sounds like just a rumor to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}My parents get on my nerves with all that "You better study!" crap.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I wanna go out for summer vacation, but I don't know if they'll let me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I totally knew it![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}My parents were so annoying, saying, "Go study! Go study!"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I wasn't able to wear my great new clothes during summer break![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}The sky was blue... The sea was blue... Why did my heart have to be blue, too!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I've been thinking... Don't you think Aigis seems different somehow?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}Don't get me wrong, I'm not saying she's a weirdo.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}She seems like... a doll. When I see her, I'm reminded of a clothing store mannequin.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}Haha, I thought as much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}Haha... You don't have to agree with me. It's probably just my imagination, after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}It sucks that they canceled the culture festival.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I was looking forward to seeing the out-there fashions, like the maid costumes and stuff.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}My parents want me to go to one of those four-year colleges.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}And after that, they think I should be a lawyer, or something smart like that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}*sigh* This is gonna suck...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I told my parents what I wanted to do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I said I wanted to do something related to fashion, and I'm going to school for that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I knew they wouldn't agree with that... You could tell by their faces.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}Ryoji-kun seems a little different.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}He's got an exotic face... No Japanese guy would ever look like that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I should hang out with him some weekend and check out his fashion style.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I HATE my stupid parents![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}They said anyone who doesn't graduate from a four-year college has no future![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}That's discrimination against the undereducated![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}You agree, right? I'm not going to back down to them this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}Is that really how it is...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I love Christmas![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}The whole town lights up... I get all excited![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}Now that Christmas is over, all the stores are closing, and all the lights have been taken down.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}Usually, there's a post-Christmas sale war... But it feels weird.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}This is so lame... I can't decide on anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I never have this much trouble picking outfits.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}Oh... I guess my clothes and my future are totally different things, huh? *sigh*[n]{f 1 1}
